summary: Completed testing of HevaPOS WiFi Subnet Auto-Detection Feature (Iteration 18). All 23 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified - @capgo/capacitor-wifi integration for auto-detecting tablet's WiFi subnet, getDeviceSubnet() method, scanWifiPrinters() with onProgress callback, and PrinterSettings showing scan progress messages.
critical_code_review_comments: printer.js Line 25: CapacitorWifi imported from '@capgo/capacitor-wifi' (static import)
printer.js Lines 353-370: getDeviceSubnet() calls CapacitorWifi.getIpAddress() and extracts subnet from first 3 octets
printer.js Line 355: getDeviceSubnet() returns null when not on native platform (expected for browser)
printer.js Lines 378-422: scanWifiPrinters(onPrinterFound, onProgress) calls getDeviceSubnet() first
printer.js Lines 385-390: scanWifiPrinters() throws clear error 'Could not detect your WiFi network' if subnet is null
printer.js Line 393: scanWifiPrinters() reports progress via onProgress callback with 'Scanning ${subnet}.x for printers...'
printer.js Lines 398-400: scanWifiPrinters() reports batch progress 'Scanning ${subnet}.${batchStart}-${batchEnd}...'
PrinterSettings.js Lines 127-135: WiFi scan uses printerService.scanWifiPrinters with onPrinterFound and onProgress callbacks
PrinterSettings.js Lines 132-134: setScanProgress(message) is passed as onProgress callback
PrinterSettings.js Lines 534-536: scanProgress displayed in UI with animate-pulse class
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data including 5 configured printers and 65 pending orders
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified the WiFi subnet auto-detection feature using @capgo/capacitor-wifi: 1) CapacitorWifi imported from '@capgo/capacitor-wifi' (static import). 2) getDeviceSubnet() calls CapacitorWifi.getIpAddress() and extracts subnet from first 3 octets (e.g., '10.0.1' from '10.0.1.45'). 3) getDeviceSubnet() returns null on web (expected). 4) scanWifiPrinters(onPrinterFound, onProgress) calls getDeviceSubnet() first. 5) scanWifiPrinters() throws clear error if no WiFi detected. 6) scanWifiPrinters() reports progress via onProgress callback. 7) PrinterSettings passes setScanProgress as onProgress callback. 8) UI shows 'Scanning your network...' and 'Scanning your network for printers...' during scan. 9) All 4 native plugins installed: @capacitor-community/bluetooth-le, @kduma-autoid/capacitor-bluetooth-printer, capacitor-tcp-socket, @capgo/capacitor-wifi. 10) Previous features still work: Print button on pending orders (65 orders), duplicate prevention, BT discovery.

frontend_tests.discover_printers_dialog: PASSED - WiFi and Bluetooth tabs available
frontend_tests.wifi_scan_progress: PASSED - 'Scanning your network...' message shown during scan
frontend_tests.print_buttons: PASSED - 65 print buttons found on pending orders

capacitor_wifi_import.verification: Code review confirmed: import { CapacitorWifi } from '@capgo/capacitor-wifi'

get_device_subnet_method.description: getDeviceSubnet() calls CapacitorWifi.getIpAddress() and extracts subnet
get_device_subnet_method.verification: Code review confirmed getDeviceSubnet() method with CapacitorWifi.getIpAddress() call and subnet extraction

scan_wifi_printers_calls_get_device_subn.description: scanWifiPrinters() calls getDeviceSubnet() first then scans that subnet
scan_wifi_printers_calls_get_device_subn.verification: Code review confirmed scanWifiPrinters() calls await this.getDeviceSubnet() before scanning

scan_wifi_printers_progress_callback.description: scanWifiPrinters() reports progress via onProgress callback
scan_wifi_printers_progress_callback.verification: Code review confirmed onProgress callback with progress messages

scan_wifi_printers_no_wifi_error.description: scanWifiPrinters() throws clear error if no WiFi detected
scan_wifi_printers_no_wifi_error.verification: Code review confirmed error: 'Could not detect your WiFi network'

printer_settings_on_progress.verification: Code review confirmed setScanProgress passed as onProgress callback

printer_settings_shows_progress.description: PrinterSettings shows scan progress messages during WiFi scan
printer_settings_shows_progress.verification: UI screenshot shows 'Scanning your network...' and 'Scanning your network for printers...'

previous_features_work.description: Print button on pending orders, duplicate prevention, BT discovery still work
previous_features_work.verification: UI test confirmed 65 print buttons on pending orders, code review confirmed _printing lock and BT methods

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. CapacitorWifi.getIpAddress() throws 'Not implemented on web' in browser - this is expected, code returns null and falls back to backend scanner. In APK it returns the device's WiFi IP address for subnet detection.
